Interface IMensuration3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides basic 3D mensuration functionality.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("829A4F6B-A404-4590-AE37-1196AF7FF6A0")]
public interface IMensuration3D

Properties

CanMeasure3D

Indicates if 3D mensuration is supported.

bool CanMeasure3D { get; }

Property Value

bool
